title: EISCO Replacement Pestle, 5.1" Length - Mortar & Pestle Sets - Heavy Duty - Unglazed Grinding End - Excellent for Kitchen or Laboratory - Grinds Herbs & Spices - Pill Crusher
description:
About this item
REPLACEMENT PART || Replacement pestle, designed for use with Eisco Labs 275ml Mortar & Pestle setS (CH0540C - CH0541D). Mortar is not included
PORCELAIN || Pestle is made of solid porcelain. Grinding surface of the rounded end of the pestle is unglazed for precise grinding and crushing
HEAVY DUTY || The heavy duty porcelain construction is resistant to chips and cracks
5.1 INCH LENGTH || Pestle measures 5.1" in length, and the rounded grinding end measures 1.4" in diameter
reviews_5s: It is the perfect length for grounding medication. Well packed and arrived on time......5*....:-}I needed these for a chemistry lab, and was willing to take anything - but they are really nice quality, and do the job well. Also, they shipped really fast, which was important too!Perfect size, as I dropped and broke my last one.
